_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: VoiceSentinel Processor
author: panda@pandadevv.dev
description: VoiceSentinel voice processing backend using Faster Whisper for transcription
startup: bash -lc 'set -e; export TMPDIR="$HOME/tmp" PIP_NO_CACHE_DIR=1 PIP_PROGRESS_BAR=off; mkdir -p "$TMPDIR"; [ -d venv ] || python3 -m venv venv; . venv/bin/activate; python -m pip install -U pip setuptools wheel; python -m pip install --extra-index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu -r requirements.txt; [ -d app ] && [ ! -f app/__init__.py ] && :> app/__init__.py || true; if [ -d voicesentinel/.git ]; then echo "Checking for updates..."; cd voicesentinel; git fetch origin main 2>/dev/null || true; LATEST=$(git rev-parse origin/main 2>/dev/null || echo ""); CURRENT=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo ""); cd ..; if [ -n "$LATEST" ] && [ -n "$CURRENT" ] && [ "$LATEST" != "$CURRENT" ]; then echo ""; echo "============================================================"; echo "WARNING:  UPDATE AVAILABLE FOR VOICESENTINEL PROCESSOR"; echo "============================================================"; echo "Current: $(cd voicesentinel && git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"; echo "Latest:  $(cd voicesentinel && git rev-parse --short origin/main 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"; echo ""; echo "To update, re-run the installation script."; echo "============================================================"; echo ""; sleep 3; fi; fi; exec python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${SERVER_PORT} --workers 1'

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
cd /mnt/server

apt-get update
apt-get install -y ffmpeg opus-tools curl git
rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Get code (full clone for update checking)
if [ ! -d voicesentinel ]; then
  git clone https://github.com/jackh54/voicesentinel.git
else
  cd voicesentinel
  git fetch origin 2>/dev/null || true
  git reset --hard origin/main 2>/dev/null || true
  cd ..
fi

# Place backend at server root
rm -rf app || true
rm -f requirements.txt || true
cp -r voicesentinel/processor-voicesentinel/app ./app
cp voicesentinel/processor-voicesentinel/requirements.txt ./requirements.txt || true

# Config: use repo example if present, else minimal
if [ -f voicesentinel/processor-voicesentinel/config.example.json ] && [ ! -f config.json ]; then
  cp voicesentinel/processor-voicesentinel/config.example.json ./config.json
elif [ ! -f config.json ]; then
  echo '{}' > config.json
fi

mkdir -p models /tmp/whisper_cache

# Make sure user-local pip bin is in PATH at runtime
if ! grep -q '/home/container/.local/bin' .profile 2>/dev/null; then
  echo 'export PATH="/home/container/.local/bin:$PATH"' >> .profile
fi

echo "Install complete."
